chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-475 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 3.For hearing of MA 4007/24 24-10-2024 None present for the applicant. Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, APG. **** ASI Sikandar Ali Dahar of P.S, Ubauro is present and files statement to show that in compliance of impugned order, FIR No.250 of 2024 at P.S, Ubauro has been registered. Since FIR has been registered, this Crl. Misc. Application has become infructuous and accordingly same is disposed of along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
